---
title: "JDemetra+" 
subtitle: "Time Series Analysis Software for official statistics"
---

- [Software and code](https://github.com/jdemetra/)

- [R packages](https://github.com/rjdverse/)

- [Documentation](https://doc.jdemetra.org)

- [User Support](https://github.com/cosa-tsa-shop/UserSupport)

- [Blog](https://blog.jdemetra.org)
